info.name: Diabetic foot ulcer — image predict
info.description:
POST multipart **image** upload for `/api/diabetic-detection/predict/`.

**Import in Apidog:** Import → Postman → choose this file.

Set variable **baseUrl** (e.g. `http://127.0.0.1:8000`).

After import, open each request → **Body** → **form-data** → field **image**: attach a **JPEG** or **PNG** file (Postman/Apidog: choose “File” for that row and pick a local image).

formdata.description: Foot photo (RGB). Any size is resized server-side to 224×224.

request.description: Multipart body with **no** `image` field → serializer error on `image` (required).
